Feedback? Ideas? Complaints? Suggestions? Request for report about other area? send me a message!
This page was generated using data obtained on various dates including 2025-05-11, 2025-05-09, 2025-03-23, 2025-03-25. Please, send me a message if you want it updated!




This page contains reports that are tested or are known to produce false positives. Be careful with using this data.
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia and wikidata tag to a science
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia and wikidata tag to a service
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia and wikidata tag to a physical process
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia and wikidata tag to a mining (activity - likely mine/quarry etc should be set instead)
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia and wikidata tag to an object that exists outside physical reality
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia and wikidata tag to an event
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia and wikidata tag to an intentional human activity
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia tag to an object that exists outside physical reality
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia tag to an event
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to a spheroidal weathering
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to a science
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to a service
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to a physical process
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to a mining (activity - likely mine/quarry etc should be set instead)
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to a wikimedia page
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to an object that exists outside physical reality
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to an event
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to an intentional human activity
  • should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to art (field of work, not the resulting work)

should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia and wikidata tag to a science
linked wikidata entry (Q598768)(Antonienheim (München) article) is about a science, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to add such prefix (or remove) wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata
Mahnmal Antonienheim - an affected OSM element that may be improved

should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia and wikidata tag to an event

(._;>;); out meta qt;//['should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia and wikidata tag to an event']


should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikipedia and wikidata tag to an intentional human activity
linked wikidata entry (Q1000954)(Luitpoldhütte article) is about an intentional human activity, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to add such prefix (or remove) wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata
Luitpoldhütte - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:

subject:wikipedia=* tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to add such prefix (or remove) wikidata tag if it is present

linked wikidata entry (Q99484867) is about a service, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to add such prefix (or remove) wikidata tag if it is present

should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to a physical process
linked wikidata entry (Q7388248)(S2 (Nuremberg) article) is about a physical process, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to add such prefix (or remove) wikidata tag if it is present

should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to a mining (activity - likely mine/quarry etc should be set instead)
linked wikidata entry (Q41281148) is about a mining (activity - likely mine/quarry etc should be set instead), so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to add such prefix (or remove) wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata
an affected OSM element that may be improved

way(318600724)['wikidata'='Q41280961']; way(390624362)['wikidata'='Q41297911']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to a mining (activity - likely mine/quarry etc should be set instead)']


should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to a wikimedia page
linked wikidata entry (Q104236261) is about a wikimedia page, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to add such prefix (or remove) wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata
an affected OSM element that may be improved

subject:wikipedia=* tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to add such prefix (or remove) wikidata tag if it is present

[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( node(11362345845)['wikidata'='Q104236261']; node(1172640342)['wikidata'='Q31323228']; node(292913056)['wikidata'='Q113644692']; way(204983720)['wikidata'='Q21876575']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to a wikimedia page']


should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to an object that exists outside physical reality
linked wikidata entry (Q41312275) is about an object that exists outside physical reality, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to add such prefix (or remove) wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata

); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to an object that exists outside physical reality']


should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to an event
linked wikidata entry (Q41378448) is about an event, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to add such prefix (or remove) wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata

way(985527892)['wikidata'='Q41368749']; way(98619944)['wikidata'='Q41411416']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to an event']


should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to an intentional human activity
linked wikidata entry (Q98606943) is about an intentional human activity, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to add such prefix (or remove) wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata
an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( way(183651157)['wikidata'='Q98606943']; way(496527861)['wikidata'='Q58684374']; way(50197433)['wikidata'='Q98581743']; way(684557372)['wikidata'='Q41355928']; way(98332709)['wikidata'='Q41411301']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to an intentional human activity']

linked wikidata entry (Q41378409) is about art (field of work, not the resulting work), so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to add such prefix (or remove) wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata
Nepomuk - an affected OSM element that may be improved

[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( node(10221434238)['wikidata'='Q41320294']; node(11283448842)['wikidata'='Q98485822']; node(12490293116)['wikidata'='Q41378409']; node(3934602410)['wikidata'='Q41318946']; node(4142635684)['wikidata'='Q41318222']; node(4250690226)['wikidata'='Q41319704']; node(5606258438)['wikidata'='Q98606772']; node(8380973589)['wikidata'='Q41319711']; node(9583709938)['wikidata'='Q41254635']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking from wikidata tag to art (field of work, not the resulting work)']
